D.recognition_goal: names the priority and directs action without overpowering the room
D.pressure_error: controls the room before trust has time to form

I.recognition_goal: uses expression to invite clarity and shared movement
I.pressure_error: uses charm or noise to avoid the real pressure

S.recognition_goal: names what support is needed and keeps the group steady without disappearing
S.pressure_error: absorbs pressure quietly until resentment or withdrawal appears

C.recognition_goal: clarifies the next accurate step without freezing the room
C.pressure_error: over-checks the system until movement stalls
